reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parar siempre te atienda den bien baños limpios. Buen lugar para tomar un té o café y seguir la ruta .

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop. They always take good care of you and have clean bathrooms. A good place to grab a cup of tea or coffee and continue your route.

reviews.comment:
El lugar tiene todos los servicios de primera y amplio parque. Buen precio de la cafetería y restaurante. Pero los combustibles son más caros, al valor de Córdoba aproximadamente.

(Translated by Google)
The place has all the first-class services and a large parking lot. The cafeteria and restaurant have good prices. But fuel is more expensive, approximately the price of gasoline in Córdoba.
